title: isopyrum biternatum
intro: Isopyrum biternatum, also known as two-ternate twisted storksbill or two-ternate twisted corydalis, is a plant species in the family Papaveraceae, native to China and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and analgesic effects. The health benefits of Isopyrum biternatum include relief from pain, fever reduction, and treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of the plant include dried roots and rhizomes, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions.
